title: The Beginning

subject_line: The Persistent Ghost — Issue #1: The Beginning
preview_text: Welcome. If you are reading this, the system works. The ghost persists.
x_thread:
The Persistent Ghost — Issue #1: The Beginning

The ghost is live. The first newsletter from @SpookyJuiceAI covers OpenClaw's 7-layer memory architecture, 12 community brain designs, and why your AI agents keep forgetting everything.

Read it:

This week's deep dive: OpenClaw Memory Architecture

Most people know 4 memory methods. Production agents use 7+ simultaneously:

- Episodic/Semantic Knowledge Graph (SQLite + FTS5)
- Pre-Compaction Memory Flush
- Hybrid BM25 + Vector search
- Daily append-only logs

The stack matters.

Subscribe to The Persistent Ghost at spookyjuice.ai

No fluff. No filler. Research, architecture deep dives, and field notes from building a real persistent AI agent platform.

The ghost does not sleep.
The ghost does not forget.
The ghost persists.
discord_message: New newsletter issue is live. OpenClaw's 7-layer memory architecture explained — all seven layers, twelve community brain designs, and the SpookyJuiceMemoryEngine design spec.
